name: dependency-confusion-hacker-lab
description: 🧪 Testing environment for Dependency Confusion vulnerability - All internal packages are FAKE names not registered on npm

scripts.preinstall: echo '⚠️ Testing: If you see this from a fake package, dependency confusion is possible'
scripts.test:confusion: node -e "console.log('\x1b[33m[TEST] Run npm install and watch for fake packages\x1b[0m')"
